title: Unique Quotients
description:
The letters A..J each represent a different single digit from the set [0..9]. Find all solutions to the quotient of two five digit numbers:

ABCDE / FGHIJ = 9

Note: leading zeros are allowed, i.e., F could be 0.
input: A single integer N that specifies which solution of the set to print.
output: Print the two integers that represent ABCDE and FGHIJ with a space between them on a line. Print only the Nth solution from the set of solutions ordered numerically smallest ABCDE first.
source: Olympiad, USA Computing Olympiad, 1998-1999 Season, USACO Winter 1999 Contest, Division B
